description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/johnnyzz/dev-build:base and a single build stage. Define a build job that runs on the linux tag, first ensures openssh-client is installed, starts ssh-agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, and disables strict host key checking. Then it SSHes to git@gitlab.com, clones the pharo-vm repository with the CI build token, initializes and updates submodules recursively, configures a build directory, runs cmake with -DST_SCRIPT=gen-pharo-nos-stack -DST_PLATFORM_NAME=PharoNOS, and finally runs make. The job stores the generated NOS.img and NOS.kernel files as artifacts from pharo-nos-build/build and pharo-nos-build/results. No additional caches or rules are defined.
